meta.title: Japanese Termination of the Pacific War: the Significance and Causal Factors of “The End of War”
meta.description: Junichiro Shoji, Michael Sheng, Arthur Herman, and Lewis Libby on the strategic jostling underlying WWII and the Korean War.
